system.effect: Encloses the victim in a separate universe of Light with no interaction with the outside world. From within, the prison resists damage equal to 100 times the Zeon spent, with AT 10. From outside, it resists double the Zeon value. Only Energy attacks with Presence greater than 180 can damage it. Regeneration 19. Avoided with MR Difficulty 140; no further checks allowed.
